instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Art homework
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We have to draw a picture of an important place for art homework. [1]Do you think I should draw the old bridge?[/1]||[2]Can I borrow your coloured pencils?[/2] Mine are nearly finished.||[3]Where can we sit and draw after school?[/3]||[4]Should we show our drawings to the teacher before Friday?[/4]||Write back soon||Grace

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Grace,||Thanks for your email. [1]I don’t think the old bridge is very interesting, but you could draw the town square because there are lots of people and buildings there.[/1]||[2]Yes, you can borrow my coloured pencils. I’ll bring them to school tomorrow and you can keep them for a few days.[/2]||[3]We could sit and draw in the park after school because there is a good view of the square from there.[/3]||[4]Yes, we should show our drawings to the teacher before Friday, so we can improve them if necessary.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Sofia
